titleStmt.title: Karantina – DZ (F.63) – All
WIBARAB Corpus
titleStmt.funder: Funded by the European Research Council under the Grant Agreement 101020127

publicationStmt.distributor: Austrian Center for Digital Humanities and Cultural Heritage

recording.p: Recorded during Lebanon Fieldwork Campaign Ana Iriarte Diez 2022

prefixDef.p: Private URIs using the teiCorpusHeader prefix are pointers to any element in the WIBARAB teiCorpus document.
Private URIs using the share prefix are pointers to audio file residing on the WIBARAB network share.
Private URIs using the geo prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on a place element in VICAV Geodata list.
Private URIs using the dmp prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on an element in the WIBARAB DMP document..
Private URIs using the zotid prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on a biblStruct element in the TEI export of the VICAV Zotero Group library.
Private URIs using the sources prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on an element in the WIBARAB list of sources.

spanGrp.span: How is your mother? How are your sisters?
Yes, thank God, Israa is good
Thank God, and her husband, thank God, is working
Thank God, she said "we have everything here, don't you worry about anything"
tomatoes, cucumbers, everything that exists in Lebanon, you can find it up there
because her son is still little, and she can work only when her son starts kindergarten
she can study, and after studying, she can work
no, I did not sell it
they say that appartments will get more expensive soon
It's a pity. I, when I first got it, it was around 145
how am I going to sell it for 65?
yes, but they said they will get more expensive soon
(if) you go to the center, it's close, (if) you go to Arax, it's close, (if) you go to... everything is close
as soon as I go up I need a lot of transport, I need a lot of taxis
now we are here, thank God, whatever God provides, we eat it, and whatever God provides, we live of.
because your uncle Abu Xaled cannot work outside anymore
so, now in his old age, he comes down to the shop
He has a wound from the times of the invasion, from (19)82.
and he had surgery on his back,
And he had surgery on his intestines, they removed his gullbladder.
and he is around 65, he may be 67.
He cannot work outside anymore. Do you want me to speak? (To M.27)
